TEXT.Text: The Ultimate Shadow Walker skill. Using secret arts summon a Sura Ninja to attack up to 20 monsters. During casting the character will be unbeatable. This skill is not allowed during PvP.

Plays a deadly concert with the Evil Spirit. No one who hears this music lives to tell the tale. 8 sonic attacks on up to 20 monsters with a final attack causing Lv5 stun to monsters. During casting, character will be unbeatable. This skill cannot be used during PvP.

The Ultimate Sentinel Technique. Rains a hail of razor sharp feathers onto the battlefield. Attacks up to 20 monsters with 60 feathers an a final bombing attack by Wind Saber. During casting, character will be unbeatable. This skill is not allowed to use during PvP.

Summons the Automatic Assault Machine, one of the finest technologies of war. It overwhelms the field, and hitting up to 20 monsters with a final bomb throw. During casting, character is invulnerable. Cannot be used in PvP.

A powerful Dark magic attack which controls gravity. Reverses gravity to attack up to 20 monsters with a more powerful final three attacks. During casting, character is invulnerable. Cannot be used in PvP.

Summons a Lightning Elemental to attack all monsters monsters in the map. It then hits up to 20 monsters with an extra powerful final electronic attack. During casting, character is invulnerable. Skill cannot be used in PvP.

The Ultimate Berserker skill. Summons the God of Ruin to give to monsters to explosively attack all monsters in range. Monsters hit by the skills final attack, will suffer a Lvl. 5 slow debuff. During casting, character is invulnerable.

The Ultimate Dragoon skill. Summon Dragons to burn all enemies in the entire map. Launches 8 physical attacks with a final lightning attack on up to 20 enemies. During casting, character is invulnerable. Skill cannot be used in PvP.
[Awakening Skill] Summons an evil Ninja to rapidly attack up to 16 enemies 4 times. Target attacked last is launched to the air. Cannotbe used while transformed into a Ninja.
[Awakening Skill] Summons an evil Ninja to rapidly attack up to 14 enemies 4 times. Target attacked last is launched to the air. Cannotbe used while transformed into a Ninja.

[Awakening Skill] Summons an evil Ninja to rapidly attack up to 8 enemies 4 times. Target attacked last is launched to the air. Cannotbe used while transformed into a Ninja.
[Awakening Skill] Summons 3 evil Ninjas to move forward and attack up to 10 standing or fallen enemies 9 times. Damage increased with skill level. Cannot be used while transformed into Ninja.

Duration: 100 seconds. Cannot use while transformed into a Ninja.

Your Gem Axe is broken. You should fix it before the processing fails.
You can 'Help' the processor of your friends or guild members. When you do this, [Process] Lapidary's Mastery will be increased.
You can process Gemstones by installing a Gem Axe in your MyHome.
Your aquarium is infected. You should fix it before the processing fails.
You can 'Help' the processor of your friends or guild members. When you do this, [Process] Farming's Mastery will be increased.
You can farm fishes by installing Aquarium at your home.
Your garden is infected. You should fix it before the processing fails.
You can 'Help' the processor of your friends or guild members. When you do this, [Process] Farming's Mastery will be increased.
You can cultivate herbs and vegetables by installing a Mini Garden in your MyHome.
Your smelter is broken. You should fix it before the processing fails.
You can 'Help' the processor of your friends or guild members. When you do this, [Process] Refinement's Mastery will be increased.
You can process Ore by installing a Smelter in your MyHome.
Your lathe is broken. You should fix it before the processing fails.
You can 'Help' the processor of your friends or guild members. When you do this, [Process] Carpentary's Mastery will be increased.
You can make timber with processing wood by installing Lathe at your home.
By equiping the 'Collecting Support Tool' into the Armor slot, you will use 'Net Casting' randomly during gathering fish. 'Net Casting' gathers more fish than normal collecting.

By equiping the 'Collecting Tool' into the weapon slot, you will able to collect fish at the 'Fishing Spot'. When the collecting level increases, the user will able to use 'Netter' and will be able to collect many fish at once.
By equiping the 'Collecting Support Tool' into the Armor slot, you will use 'Mowing' randomly during gathering grass. 'Mowing' gathers more grass than normal collecting.

By equiping the 'Collecting Tool' into the weapon slot, you will able to collect grass at the 'Herb and Veggie Field'. When the collecting level increases, the user will able to use the 'Mower' and will be able to collect many grasses at once.
By equipping the 'Collecting Support Tool' into the Armor slot, you will use 'Drilling' randomly during gathering ores. 'Drilling' gathers more ores than normal collecting.

By equipping the 'Collecting Tool' into the weapon slot, you will able to collect ores at the 'Mining Area'. When the collecting level increases, the user will able to use the 'Drill' and will be able to collect many ores at once.
By equipping the 'Collecting Support Tool' into the Armor slot, you will use 'Sawing' randomly during gathering logs. 'Sawing' gathers more logs than normal collecting.

By equipping the 'Collecting Tool' into the weapon slot, you will able to collect logs at the 'Logging Area'. When the collecting level increases, the user will able to use the 'Chainsaw' and will be able to collect many logs at once.

A special skill for the twin, by combining their souls, they become one, increasing their stats. While they are in a fusion status, their attack rate, speed, movement is increased by 8%. While in fusion status, they can not use the combo skills and in normal attack the combo will only work for 1 player.
